<!-- indicator: fig-hospital-exclusive-bf-percent (fallback) -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-hospital-exclusive-bf-percent
#| fig-cap: 'Hospital exclusive bf percent'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization of Hospital exclusive bf percent.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-hospital-exclusive-bf-percent", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
